description: Edge Function Supabase key requirements and justifications. Enforced by scripts/audit-function-key-requirements.mjs.

achievement-claim.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

admin-api.reason: Consolidated privileged admin API router that dispatches to multiple admin endpoints. Uses service role for controlled bypass of RLS after explicit permission checks (requirePermission) and rate limiting.

admin-fraud-actions.reason: Privileged admin endpoint: verifies admin permissions using user JWT, then uses service role for controlled reads/writes across fraud case/action tables.

admin-fraud-cases.reason: Privileged admin endpoint: verifies admin permissions using user JWT, then uses service role for controlled reads/writes across fraud case/action tables.

admin-ride-intent-convert.reason: Privileged admin endpoint: verifies admin permissions using user JWT, then uses service role to convert ride intents with controlled server-side updates.

admin-users-list.reason: Privileged admin endpoint: verifies admin permissions using user JWT, then uses service role to list users and admin membership safely.

ai-gateway.reason: AI gateway that performs server-side logging, policy enforcement, and privileged reads/writes; uses service role.

asiapay-notify.reason: Payment provider webhook ingest: verifies signature then persists events and updates payment records; service role required.

asiapay-return.reason: Payment/provider callback handler requiring service role to persist events and update records server-side.

asiapay-withdraw-webhook.reason: Withdrawal provider webhook ingest: verifies signature then persists events and updates payout records; service role required.

concierge.reason: Server-side concierge workflow that writes operational records and may bypass RLS for controlled orchestration.

device-token-upsert.reason: Client-scoped write via RLS using publishable key and user JWT.

driver-accept.reason: User-scoped driver endpoint. Uses anon key + user JWT and DB-side security-definer wrapper(s) bound to auth.uid().

driver-leaderboard-refresh.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

driver-location-update.reason: User-scoped driver endpoint. Uses anon key + user JWT and calls an auth.uid()-bound RPC; Edge enforces rate limiting and basic validation.

driver-stats-rollup.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

earnings-coach.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

edge-webhook-dispatcher.reason: Cron outbox dispatcher that claims tasks and invokes internal Edge webhook endpoints; requires service role to call service-only outbox RPCs.

edge-webhook-prune.reason: Cron maintenance job to prune processed outbox rows and prevent unbounded growth; requires service role to call service-only outbox prune RPC.

expire-rides.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

family-invite.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key + user JWT; DB mutation/authorization enforced via SECURITY DEFINER RPC bound to auth.uid().

fare-engine.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

fee-breakdown.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

fraud-score-runner.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

geo.reason: Server-side geo orchestration that calls third-party routing/geocoding APIs using secret provider keys, enforces provider fallback/quota rules, caches responses, and persists request logs; uses service role for controlled writes/reads.

hotspot-guidance.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

interest-seed.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

kyc-doc-url.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

kyc-required-documents.reason: User-scoped KYC endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

kyc-submit.reason: User-scoped KYC endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

maps-config.reason: Does not call Supabase APIs; no project keys required.

maps-config-v2.reason: Public provider selection endpoint that reads maps provider configuration + capability matrix and enforces monthly quota selection; uses service role to bypass RLS for controlled reads.

maps-usage.reason: Public metering endpoint that increments month-to-date usage counters for provider quota enforcement; uses service role to write usage rollups server-side.

match-ride.reason: User-scoped endpoint. Uses anon key + user JWT and DB-side security-definer wrapper bound to auth.uid().

merchant-chat-autoreply.reason: Webhook-driven chat automation that writes messages/metadata server-side; uses service role.

notifications-dispatch.reason: Internal dispatch worker that reads/writes notification queues and updates delivery state server-side; uses service role.

notifications-send.reason: Internal send worker that writes delivery outcomes and updates notification state server-side; uses service role.

ops-alert-notifier.reason: Cron notifier that dispatches ops alert events to Slack/webhooks/email and updates notification state; requires service role for server-side reads/writes.

ops-alert-runner.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

ops-dashboard.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

passkey-authenticate.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

passkey-register.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

payments-config.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

payout-job-action.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

payout-job-create.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

payout-job-runner.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

payout-job-send.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

profile-avatar-url.reason: Generates signed Storage URLs server-side (service role) after verifying the user JWT; DB updates remain RLS-scoped.

promotion-notify.reason: Payment/provider callback handler requiring service role to persist events and update records server-side.

qicard-notify.reason: Payment provider webhook ingest: verifies signature then persists events and updates payment records; service role required.

qicard-return.reason: Does not call Supabase APIs; no project keys required.

qicard-withdraw-webhook.reason: Withdrawal provider webhook ingest: verifies signature then persists events and updates payout records; service role required.

rate-limit-prune.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

referral-apply.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

referral-claim.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

referral-code.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

referral-redeem.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

ride-chat-mark-read.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

ride-chat-media-url.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

ride-chat-send.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key + user JWT; critical state changes occur in SECURITY DEFINER RPCs bound to auth.uid().

ride-intent-create.reason: User-scoped endpoint. Uses publishable key + user JWT and a SECURITY DEFINER RPC bound to auth.uid() for the state-changing insert.

ride-pickup-pin.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

ride-transition.reason: User-scoped endpoint. Uses anon/publishable key + user JWT and a SECURITY DEFINER RPC bound to auth.uid() for state changes.

ride-verify-pin.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key + user JWT; critical mutation happens inside a SECURITY DEFINER RPC bound to auth.uid().

ridecheck-respond.reason: User-scoped safety endpoint using publishable key + user JWT; critical update is handled in ridecheck_respond_user (SECURITY DEFINER) and Edge only rate-limits/logs.

safety-report.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

safety-sos.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

scheduled-ride-cancel.reason: User-scoped endpoint; fraud/rate-limit gating in Edge with mutation enforced by authenticated DB RPC.

scheduled-ride-create.reason: User-scoped endpoint using publishable key with RLS and user JWT.

shift-planner.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

sms-hook.reason: Supabase Auth SMS hook handler writing OTP delivery logs/status server-side; uses service role.

stats-rollup.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

topup-check.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

topup-create.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

topup-reconcile.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

trip-broadcast-runner.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

trip-share-auto.reason: DB-triggered safety automation invoked via outbox dispatcher; requires service role for internal notifications and token writes.

trusted-contacts-dispatch.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

voice-call-create.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

voice-call-end.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

voice-call-join.reason: Server-side endpoint requiring service role for controlled privileged database access.

webhook-job-runner.reason: Background/cron job requiring service role for server-side writes and maintenance tasks.

zaincash-return.reason: Payment/provider callback handler requiring service role to persist events and update records server-side.

zaincash-webhook.reason: Payment provider webhook ingest: verifies signature then persists events and updates payment records; service role required.

zaincash-withdraw-webhook.reason: Withdrawal provider webhook ingest: verifies signature then persists events and updates payout records; service role required.
